info.title: Kampose - .NET API Documentation Composer
info.description: Command-line tool for .NET projects that composes XML documentation comments, assemblies, and custom topics into comprehensive API documentation. Supports multiple output formats (HTML, Markdown) with extensible theme system and Handlebars templating.

commands.name: build
commands.description:
Generate documentation from .NET assemblies and XML
comments

options.name: --clean
options.description: Clear the output directory before generating documentation.

options.name: --debug
options.description: Enable detailed logging to help diagnose issues during the documentation generation process.

options.name: --help
options.description:
Display this help message and exit.
If no configuration file is specified, the tool defaults to 'kampose.json' in the current directory.
